reforms.description: The Investment Fund was established to provide loans for both private enterprises and State-owned companies, aimed at promoting productive investment.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: The fund promotes productive investment, which is expected to enhance economic productivity and innovation.
reforms.status_evidence: The Investment Fund has been established and is operational.
reforms.importance_rationale: The establishment of the Investment Fund represents a significant structural change in the financing of productive investments.
reforms.source_quote: Investment Fund enters into force. Capital to consist of funds transferred through budget, proceeds of loan raisings and funds accruing through Fund's own operations.

reforms.description: A law concerning aid to productive activities in development regions was enacted, providing financial assistance for investment, startup operations, and employee training.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: The financial assistance aims to foster startup operations and employee training, which are crucial for economic growth and innovation.
reforms.status_evidence: The law has been enacted and is currently providing financial assistance.
reforms.importance_rationale: The enactment of this law represents a major reform in supporting productive activities in development regions.
reforms.source_quote: Law concerning aid to productive activities in development regions enters into force (for period 1975-79). Aid may be given for investment, for starting-up operations and for training purposes.
